description: 修复用户反馈的 Apple 健康同步显示 Not Found。iOS Release 使用的生产 API 对 POST /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync 返回 404，而其它 health-data 指标接口正常返回认证错误，确认问题是线上 xjie-api 容器缺少设备同步路由，不是 HealthKit 权限或 iOS 请求路径问题。已将当前 iOS 仓库的 backend/app/routers/indicators_extra.py 同步到阿里云服务器源码和运行容器，重启 xjie-api，并用同步后的源码重建 xjie-backend 镜像，确保当前容器和未来镜像都包含 /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync。
verification: Before deploy, production OPTIONS /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync returned 404 while /api/health-data/indicators returned 401, proving the API service was alive but the device-sync route was missing.
Container route inspection after deploy printed /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync.
Production OPTIONS /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync now returns 405 Method Not Allowed with Allow: POST instead of 404.
Production unauthenticated POST /api/health-data/indicators/device-sync now returns 401 Missing Bearer token instead of 404, proving the request reaches the protected sync endpoint.
Production /healthz returned 200 {"ok":true} after xjie-api restart.
Server docker image xjie-backend was rebuilt from the synced source so future container recreation keeps the route.
Local python3 -m py_compile backend/app/routers/indicators_extra.py backend/app/models/user_indicator_value.py passed.
git diff --check passed in XJie_IOS.
pytest backend/tests/unit/test_device_indicator_sync.py was not run locally because the current host Python environment does not have pytest installed.
notes: No iOS client code change was required; the existing TestFlight build can retry the same endpoint.
No SSH password, database password, API key, JWT, Apple account credential, or user token was written to code, memory, development records, commit message, or chat summary.

description: 修复 XAGE 数据页指标数据可信度问题：移除 HRV、睡眠、血糖波动、体温和添加指标候选表中的固定演示数值，用户没有的指标显示无、待同步或待上传；血压不再使用旧的组合血压卡和 118/76 假值，改为收缩压、舒张压两个明确指标，并在 HealthKit 中读取对应 quantity。指标卡整卡可点击进入液态玻璃详情页，展示数值、来源、更新时间和当前状态。服务端趋势点新增 source 和 measured_at，iOS 按来源与时效判断数据是否需更新；日常/Apple 健康类 2 天、血压/体重/体脂 14 天、报告类 180 天。后端设备同步接口调整为 Apple 健康同日同指标可覆盖旧手动/设备记录，避免老版本小捷手动数据压住新同步数据。

description: 审查并重构 iOS XAGE 问答前后端：将主体、数据源、时效、证据、报告状态和安全风险先结构化，再由确定性路由或 LLM 处理；补齐幂等租约、SSE、授权、网络重试、特殊人群和响应守卫，并通过 32 个 Simulator 人工场景、完整自动化回归、生产 PostgreSQL 迁移及公网合成账号验证。
changes: 后端新增统一 ChatRouteDecision，急症、确定性高风险、澄清、快答和 LLM 共用同步/SSE 执行与落库管线。
新增 chat_request_receipts 数据库租约和 Alembic 0020，阻止重试、并发和租约接管产生重复用户消息或回答。
健康 NLU 扩展主体、否定、时态、当前概念、数据来源、时效、证据和最新明确状态，防止本人/家属及跨主题污染。
补齐成人血压、无单位血糖、低血糖、酮症、孕产高血压和儿童低血糖的确定性安全边界。
响应守卫移除内部字段、原始错误、ISO 时间和重复建议，禁止无证据趋势、虚构症状及已知设备重复追问。
iOS 接入 SSE 路由进度、token 绑定刷新、有限连接等待、显式 AI 授权、失败气泡重试和新对话请求隔离。
iOS TLS 改为系统验证并使用生产 HTTPS；Info.plist 移除任意网络放行并声明出口合规加密状态。
修复中文拼音候选词发送后输入框残留，保护下一条新草稿不被延迟清理。
Docker 构建改为敏感文件过滤和运行目录白名单复制，阻止服务器 .env、本地数据库、证书和缓存进入镜像。
Nginx 为 SSE 增加精确无缓冲路由，并恢复公网隐私政策转发。

description: 修复复合健康问题回答被截断、主气泡只显示短摘要、候选文献错题或错号、历史回载引用漂移等完整故障链；将多因素因果覆盖、响应完整性、引用主体/方向/强度、证据快照和 iOS 适用人群展示做成通用契约，并通过三轮独立反例审查、全量测试、iPhone 17 Pro Simulator 人工视觉验证和生产公网合成账号全链路回归。
changes: 健康 NLU 新增 causal_assessment 和复合概念覆盖，客观评估要求按本轮实际概念动态生成，不再把鼻炎、侧弯或缺氧规则泛化到无关因果问题。
Provider 禁用会吞掉严格 JSON 输出预算的 thinking，对 finish_reason、未闭合 JSON、残句、Markdown、长度和必答概念做完整性校验；失败只重试一次，连续失败返回可重试状态。
响应守卫阻断未经证实的缺氧因果断言，补齐情绪危机和呼吸急症边界，并避免重复安全提示。
文献检索按概念组约束候选；引用后处理不再猜测换绑论文，只保留原编号下主体、方向、极性和证据强度一致的结论，并对 summary/analysis/answer_markdown 统一紧凑重编号。
assistant 元数据保存版本化 citation 快照、reply_to_user_message_id、summary、answer、followups 和 response_state；幂等 replay 与历史接口保持证据顺序和语义不漂移。

description: 在上一轮确定性问答修复基础上继续加固整个防回归闭环：UI/网络/APIService/HealthKit/通知/NWPath 使用 exact token 与唯一 owner，UI 测试统一 factory 和逐 launch 审计；XCTest/Python 使用精确运行时清单；PBX comment/string token 化后验证真实 source/target/framework/package/config/scheme graph 和 ancestor identity，Release 同时验证静态与 xcodebuild 有效 linker/bridging/search 设置；backend 绑定原生解释器/依赖并由外层复核新 JUnit；整个 IPA 在解包前绑定 local/central 连续身份并检查 binary secret、CMS 与 snapshot TOCTOU；发布绑定官方 PR/SHA/保护规则、未上传 build、候选 app version/build、隔离 gate Python、Xcode 26.3 (17C529)、schema 5 evidence 和同一已验证 IPA。

检查 APIService、ChatViewModel、AppDelegate、PushNotificationManager、NotificationScheduler、AppleHealthSyncViewModel 和 NetworkMonitor 的公网、通知、HealthKit 与网络路径入口；额外扫描全部 URLSession 请求/别名、APIService/trustedSession 简单及 tuple/pattern shadow、Data/NSData/String URL 读取、AsyncImage、WebKit、Network/CFNetwork/POSIX socket 和 UI test 直连。

changes: Added one Debug-only deterministic URLSession boundary with exact opt-in, known fixtures, unknown-route failure and per-launch intercepted/unhandled auditing; deterministic chat responses remain prompt-bound and do not prove real AI quality.

Disabled HealthKit, notification-center registration/scheduling and uncontrolled network-path monitoring during UI automation; exact source-wide NWPathMonitor, HKHealthStore and UNUserNotificationCenter.current token/owner contracts prevent a second direct, contextual or stored-factory entry while normal Debug and Release retain production behavior.

Introduced XAgeUITestCase as the only UI application lifecycle owner, pinned exact XCUIApplication/launch/terminate tokens, and made each test/launch fail if no request was intercepted, an unhandled request appeared or the audit did not remain stable.
Added tracked exact XCTest and Python runtime inventories and validators that reject missing, extra, duplicate, renamed, skipped, expected-failure and parameterization-shrink false greens.

Made test-only and quality-gate changes primary behavior domains, added immutable staged/pushed candidate checks, and made release validation require the fixed official repository, a merged PR, the exact workflow/check app and verified protection on both branches.

Made candidate-snapshot hooks retain the caller index only through write-tree/commit-tree, then clear every git rev-parse --local-env-vars entry for linked-worktree creation, removal and validation; the actual relative-index hook environment is covered by an existing exact-inventory test.

Pinned the policy job to macos-15 because its 74-tool suite executes the production /bin/zsh release path; fixed all policy tools/guard commands to /usr/bin/python3 -I, and added exact job-slice assertions so runner, interpreter and command placement cannot silently drift while backend and aggregation remain on Ubuntu.

Moved the no-side-effect --upload authentication metadata preflight after repository/environment/lock checks but before pinned Xcode and assert-release, ensuring missing/partial/mixed-auth negative tests validate their target contract on hosted macOS without reading passwords or reaching archive/upload.
Required every iOS-affecting change to create a fresh unsigned generic/platform=iOS Release archive and run the fail-closed bundle verifier against the device app.
Extended the bundle verifier with a pure-Python Mach-O parser that accepts only executable thin arm64 iOS-device binaries and rejects fake/FAT/x86/dylib/simulator/malformed executables.
Bound release evidence schema 5 to trusted Xcode 26.3 (17C529), official PR/SHA/check/protection state and the unique project app version/build; every signoff must match that version/build.

Changed TestFlight export to one local IPA, verified the actual distribution signature/entitlements/profile and bound its SHA-256 plus CDHash before pinned altool may upload that same IPA; incomplete or mixed authentication metadata fails closed.

Removed the generated development_history.html artifact from backend_core classification and moved its generator into quality_process_gate, preventing history synchronization from inventing an unrelated backend production change while keeping generator edits protected by tools tests.

Hardened manual sign-off files to local regular evidence under .quality/evidence with matching SHA-256 while documenting that digest integrity does not authenticate tester identity or prove the test occurred.

Bound the ignored backend virtualenv to a repo-external native executable, isolated runtime probe and full site-packages snapshot before/after every affected gate; deleted fixed JUnit outputs before execution and independently checked exact IDs/failures/duplicates/skips afterward.

Required formal release/assert-release to run under root-owned isolated Apple/Xcode Python, rebuilt child environments from a minimal allowlist and disabled zsh startup files plus Python/pytest/Xcode injection paths.
Added latest_uploaded_build=17 as the sole monotonic release boundary, so the current build 17 cannot be re-signed or re-uploaded and the next candidate must be at least 18 with fresh sign-offs.

Validated the IPA ZIP envelope and every local header/data span against its central entry contiguously through the sole final EOCD before extraction; rejected gaps, identity/extra mismatches, unsafe paths, links/special entries, abnormal expansion, sensitive names, PEM/DER/PKCS#8/OpenSSH/private JWK/SQLite and whitespace-only oversized prefixes, then required one Apple-trusted CMS signer and matched the actual codesign leaf DER to DeveloperCertificates.

Restricted production networking to the explicit APIService trusted transport, rejected known Swift network bypass APIs, tuple/pattern shadows and UI-test requests, moved URL-backed local reads behind a file-only loader, and pinned nondeterministic system constructors to one UI-safe owner.

Parsed every top-level PBX object and order-independent isa after masking comments/tokenizing strings, rejected duplicate critical keys, hidden aggregate/shell targets, dependency/proxy swaps and symlinks for every source-root file/ancestor, pinned the graph/scheme, and checked static plus effective Release settings.

Created an owner-only single-hard-link read-only IPA snapshot and revalidated path/device/inode/link count/mode/size/hash immediately before pinned altool, reducing but not eliminating same-UID TOCTOU.

Made the public pre-login /api/auth/subjects UI fixture an exact anonymous contract and added fail-closed bearer/query/method counterexamples after the full gate caught the previous authenticated-only test-helper blind spot.

Historical iOS checkpoint: Unit 149/149, full UI 5/5, SE 3 small-screen 2/2 and a fresh unsigned generic iOS device archive passed at that tree; final amended working-tree impacted is still pending.

A direct signed archive/export of the current build 17 tree exposed pinned-Xcode local/central extra and signed-descriptor bytes, but violated the mandatory release order. No upload occurred, all artifacts were deleted, and the run is explicitly excluded from compliant evidence.

The first application-impact working-tree gate passed tools 74/74, iOS Unit 149/149, full UI 5/5, unsigned generic iOS archive plus device verifier, backend AI 213/213, backend Health 25/25, SE 3 small-screen UI 2/2 and diff check, then was deliberately superseded after final audit found the whole-IPA and non-URLSession network gaps.

The post-hook exact commit e8a0fd5 completed the local impacted gate at 2026-07-14 05:07:28 +08:00: tools 74/74, iOS Unit 149/149, full UI 5/5, small UI 2/2, unsigned device archive/bundle verification, focused backend 238/238 and final diff. It did not rerun backend full 264.

A later complete impacted run passed every local stage, but the first real git commit exposed relative GIT_INDEX_FILE handling in the candidate worktree and therefore invalidated that result. The repaired hook is now exercised by the existing immutable-snapshot test and tools passed 74/74; a new complete impacted run is required before delivery.

PR #4 exact SHA e8a0fd5 passed backend but failed policy because Ubuntu lacked /bin/zsh. Runner, /usr/bin/python3 and auth-before-Xcode contracts are fixed and their focused tests passed 2/2; pending before completion are a new full impacted, new-SHA PR CI, merge, official exact merged-HEAD push quality-gate and XAGE protection readback. TestFlight additionally remains blocked by main protection and five independently verifiable sign-offs bound to a new build >=18.
notes: Latest uploaded TestFlight remains 1.0(17). latest_uploaded_build is 17, so the unchanged current project build 17 is release-ineligible; a future candidate must be at least build 18 and repeat all five sign-offs. A direct build 17 signed archive/export was mistakenly executed without the mandatory gates; no upload occurred, all artifacts were deleted, and it must never be reused or cited as compliant evidence.

XAGE and main branch protections have not been installed or read back. main is 69 commits behind XAGE and still has old fail-open CI without a compatible quality-gate, so main protection requires a separate explicit sync/bootstrap decision and successful CI; it must not be reported as complete.

The repository currently has only its owner, so eventual required PR approval remains 0 and does not provide independent protection against self-weakening changes. Add a real collaborator, one approval and last-push approval before claiming independent enforcement.
Evidence path and SHA-256 prove byte integrity only; they do not authenticate a tester or prove execution. The publisher must not self-fill the five sign-offs as independent evidence.
Exact IDs and static checks catch many suite reductions but cannot prove that every rewritten assertion preserves semantic strength; this requires independent review.

The three fixed backend skips are tests.integration.test_api_chat_mock::test_chat_mock_placeholder, tests.integration.test_api_glucose_import::test_glucose_import_flow_placeholder and tests.integration.test_api_meals_flow::test_meals_photo_flow_placeholder; all require a dockerized PostgreSQL and Redis stack.

Backend dependencies remain incompletely locked, Dashboard lacks a dedicated auth regression, some deterministic empty fixtures prove protocol boundaries rather than full business semantics, and the new App Store Connect authentication path has not performed a real upload.

Backend runtime/JUnit binding prevents accidental false greens from shell launchers, stale XML and dependency drift, but does not claim protection from an active same-UID race or fully bind the external Python framework, standard library and dynamic libraries.

The Swift static network allowlist blocks every known/current bypass and requires future transports to add negative tests, but it is not an OS-level outbound firewall and cannot prove that arbitrary runtime reflection or a newly introduced low-level framework cannot connect.

The final ZIP parser understands the pinned-Xcode local/central extra and signed-descriptor bytes observed during the noncompliant build 17 export, but compliant compatibility evidence remains blocked until a future build >=18 passes release and assert-release and the tracked script creates the candidate.

No Android, production backend, database, build number or TestFlight upload is included. Root memory and development history are updated separately under workspace rules. No credential, token, signing material or real health data is recorded.

author: Codex
subject: fix(ios-xage): stabilize continuous chat accessibility lifecycle
feature: fix(ios-xage): stabilize continuous chat accessibility lifecycle
scope: iOS / XAGE / Continuous Chat / Keyboard / Accessibility / Regression Enforcement
description: 修复 XAGE 同一会话连续问答在内容首次溢出后，键盘退场、快速回复、多路自动滚动和 Markdown 辅助功能解析共同造成的主线程/AX 快照卡顿；新增 App-owned 精确终态、小屏长问题回归、合法 Markdown 语义断言和会拒绝旁路变异的静态规则，并把任何 required gate 的同树红/绿序列永久视为未闭环失败。
root_cause: PR #4 的 exact-SHA CI 与合并后 push 使用相同 Git tree、runner、Xcode 和模拟器，但后者在第三条发送后主线程持续 busy，无法取得 idle/AX snapshot。本机修复前重复运行复现后，现场画面已完成回复且键盘已关闭，进程 sample 则停在 SwiftUI AccessibilityNode 对 AttributedString link rotor、vertical TextField 和整棵辅助功能树的解析。一次即时响应会由 messages、sending、thinking 与上传相关监听排入多次主队列动画 scrollTo，普通助手文本又无条件构造 Markdown AttributedString；历史增长和键盘退场后没有可预测的静止边界。旧流程还允许用随后一次绿灯覆盖 required failure，且没有逐监听实现约束、负向变异或 App-owned 终态，因此相同竞态能在后续修改再次出现。
same_class_scan: 对比 PR run 29287041288 与合并 push run 29288925828 的 tree、runner、Xcode 26.3 (17C529)、iPhone 16 Pro/iOS 18.5 和逐步日志，排除 prompt 分支、代码差异和公网 transport；保留失败 job 86947874119。
修复前在本机执行同一 12-prompt 用例的重复运行并保留卡顿截图和进程 sample；确认消息和输入法的业务终态已经完成，而 AX 全树快照正在解析 Markdown link rotor、SwiftUI AccessibilityNode 和 UITextViewAccessibility。
扫描 XAGE 的 messages.count、sending、thinkingStepIndex、uploading、backgroundTaskHint 全部自动滚动入口及旧 ChatView，统一改为不排队、禁动画的 ChatAutoScroll transaction。

扫描发送、点击空白、滚动、切页、附件、新对话、历史回载和重试路径；Return 只插入换行且不发送、不关闭键盘，纸飞机是唯一的草稿发送动作。纸飞机先同步捕获不可变草稿、释放焦点并显式关闭键盘，之后才启动异步任务；快捷问题、初始提示、重试、同意后继续、报告上传后续和相邻 outbound 方法/别名也必须使用审计过的 dismissal/wiring。UI 测试先等待 phase/messages/latest/focused 唯一终态。

扫描 XAgeChatBubble 与共享 MarkdownTextView；视觉不变的普通文本走 Text(verbatim:)，粗体、单行/跨行强调、删除线、行内代码、转义、实体、链接及 CR/CRLF/NUL 规范化仍进入原视觉 Markdown；无链接富文本使用单一去标记 AX Text，含链接富文本按相邻 URL 合并并通过 Link(destination:) + .isLink 保留动作。跟踪测试使用可复现的代表性确定性 case，不引用没有对应脚本和结果包的超大规模 fuzz 数量。
扫描 thinking 与 upload 状态卡；两者现在共用 ChatProgressIndicator，只有显式 Debug UI automation 使用静态状态图标，普通 Debug 与 Release 继续使用正常 ProgressView。

扩展既有 tools test 对全仓库 SwiftUI/UIKit 滚动 API、UIScrollView/ScrollPosition、代理、transaction、onChange、共享 helper 标识符清单、XAGE/旧聊天状态监听同步结构、全部发送方法与别名、同步退键盘顺序、lifecycle 真实值/live wiring、真实 root 消息/Markdown consumer、完整条件编译块、共享进度 consumer、键盘拖拽安装器、Markdown replacement/link tree，以及共享 UI test base 的 wait helper 和每次 launch 网络审计 live call 逐一审计；实际构造并拒绝 68 个显式对抗变异，其中 66 个 chat 变异、2 个 shared UI support 变异，后两项分别阻止恒真等待和保留正确实现但从不调用的网络审计假绿。
test_evidence: 远端 PR run 29287041288 在 tree a96b62d 上全绿；同一 tree 的合并后 push run 29288925828 / iOS job 86947874119 在第三条发送后主线程持续 busy 并失败。该红灯被保留为根因输入，不能由 PR 绿灯或 rerun 覆盖。

本机修复前重复运行复现：截图显示回复已呈现、输入为空、键盘已关闭；脱敏调用链 implementation_audit/ios_chat_ax_quiescence_20260714/root_cause_stack_excerpt.txt 显示主线程位于 XCTest AX snapshot、SwiftUI AccessibilityNode、AttributedString 与 UITextViewAccessibility 路径。

修复后的 focused Swift 编译/行为检查完成 ChatViewModelTests.testSendMessageAppendsUserMessage 1/1，覆盖连续两轮唯一终态，以及普通文本、乘法、inline 列表、单行/跨行强调、显式/裸链接、邮箱、单波浪线、转义、实体和 CR/CRLF/NUL 的实际字符/属性/accessibility 结果，并锁定 link representation 的去标记分段与真实 URL；结构化摘要与完整说明已固化在 implementation_audit/ios_chat_ax_quiescence_20260714/。

扩展后的 focused release-policy 测试 1/1 通过，并实际确认 68 个显式对抗变异均被 chat_quiescence_policy_violations 拒绝：66 个 chat 变异 + 2 个 shared UI support 变异；root consumer、编译条件、恒真 wait、dead network-audit、accessibility tree 和 link action 旁路都会变红。

把系统 Return 错误假设成发送动作的 /tmp/xjie-chat-keyboard-submit-ui.xcresult 诚实失败 1/1（108.594 秒）：预期 phase=idle;messages=2;latest=assistant;focused=false，实际 phase=idle;messages=0;latest=none;focused=true；这证明 Return 只保留多行草稿。红灯全文节选保存在 implementation_audit/ios_chat_ax_quiescence_20260714/keyboard_return_failure_excerpt.txt，没有由后续绿灯豁免。
纠正后的 /tmp/xjie-chat-multiline-se.xcresult 在 iPhone SE（第 3 代）1/1 通过（70.354 秒），覆盖 Return 换行、纸飞机发送、同步收键盘、完整多行用户正文和精确终态。

Markdown Link 修正后的 /tmp/xjie-markdown-link-ui2.xcresult 为 1/1 通过（210.986 秒）；最终 focused /tmp/xjie-chat-final-focused4.xcresult 也为 13-prompt 1/1 通过（210.874 秒），精确断言 26 条消息和真实可命中 Link。此前错误要求 XCUIElementTypeLink 的红灯和实际 Button 层级保存在 implementation_audit/ios_chat_ax_quiescence_20260714/markdown_link_ax_failure_excerpt.txt，没有被标 flaky 或降成静态文字。

加入链接前的历史 12-prompt /tmp/xjie-chat-final-repeat2.xcresult 曾连续 relaunch 5/5 通过，共 60 条问题/120 条消息，但不计作当前树证据。/tmp/xjie-chat-final-13-repeat.xcresult 实际只有前 2 次通过，第 3 次 Testing was canceled；/tmp/xjie-chat-final-audited-repeat.xcresult 也被主动取消，两者结果均为 failed 且不计绿。当前 68-mutation、13-prompt 最终树的 /tmp/xjie-chat-final-68-repeat.xcresult 已完整 relaunch 5/5 通过，xcresulttool 独立确认 5 passed、0 failed、0 skipped，共核对 65 个问题/130 条消息；最终 working-tree impacted 随后从头通过 tools 74、Unit 149、full UI 5、SE 小屏 UI 2、无签名 Release archive/bundle verifier、backend AI 213、Health 25 与最终 diff。新 PR exact feature SHA、合并后 exact SHA push CI 与 XAGE 保护回读仍是强制待办。
changes: 将 XAGE 和旧聊天入口的自动底部定位统一收口到 ChatAutoScroll：同步执行、Transaction(animation: nil)、disablesAnimations=true，不再向主队列叠加 withAnimation。
新增仅 Debug 明确 UI automation 模式可见的 xage.chat.lifecycle，精确暴露 idle/sending、消息数、最新角色和输入焦点；每轮 UI 断言先等待 App-owned 终态再查询键盘和正文。
Return 只插入换行且不发送、不关闭键盘；纸飞机是唯一草稿发送动作，并在异步任务开始前同步捕获不可变草稿、释放焦点和显式关闭键盘。SE 小屏用例先证明 Return 保留多行草稿，再点击纸飞机并验证首次溢出后的终态、键盘、完整用户消息和 prompt-bound 助手回显。
视觉不变的普通正文不暴露 AttributedString 文本树；当前 inline renderer 用保守候选保留原视觉富文本和 Foundation 字符规范化。无链接富文本以单一去标记 Text 替换 AX 树，含链接富文本按 URL run 合并成 Text/Link 分段并显式保留 .isLink；单元、UI/AX 和静态负变异共同防止普通文本 AX 成本与链接动作退化。
thinking 与 upload 状态卡共用 ChatProgressIndicator；只有显式 Debug UI automation 使用静态状态图标，Release 与普通 Debug 仍使用正常 ProgressView。
把 required failure 的证据、复现、根因、同类扫描、永久不变量、新提交完整本地/托管门禁要求写入 AGENTS、回归政策和 PROCESS-GATE-001；同树重跑变绿不再具有豁免效力。
新增 UX-CHAT-QUIESCENCE-001，并在既有精确 test ID 内加入连续发送、Markdown 语义、全部状态监听、Return/纸飞机、同步退键盘、共享进度 consumer、完整 root/条件编译/UI base 和 68 个负向变异断言，不改变 Unit 149 / full UI 5 / small UI 2 / tools 74 的运行时清单。

author: Codex
subject: refactor(architecture): harden canonical delivery and split XAGE responsibilities
feature: refactor(architecture): harden canonical delivery and split XAGE responsibilities
scope: iOS Repository / Canonical Main / Production Deployment / PostgreSQL Catalog / XAGE Swift Architecture
description: 按先立规则、再迁移实现的顺序完成维护架构升级：main 成为唯一 canonical 分支，XAGE 固定为 locked read-only legacy；生产镜像、部署 helper、数据库目录核验和异常恢复被纳入不可变、fail-closed 证据链；随后先建立 Swift 文件全集与聚合预算，再把 XAgeMainView 从 10305 行单体拆为七个职责文件。拆分只移动既有声明并调整必要的模块内可见性，不改变 UI、交互、评分算法、网络协议或构建号。
root_cause: 此前分支名称没有唯一角色，部署运行实例、镜像、环境、数据库物理结构和 cutover 状态也没有形成同一不可变身份；应用启动仍存在隐藏 schema DDL。部署凭据通道只检查 FIFO 文件类型，无法区分匿名内核 pipe 与路径型命名 FIFO。Linux launcher 的真实 Docker 自测还自行拼接过旧式生命周期容器名，未复用 guard 的 run_id + role 精确身份规则，导致新约束只能在托管 Linux 上暴露夹具漂移。Swift 侧仅限制固定 XAgeMainView.swift 的单文件体积，且迁移期兼容若在拆分后继续保留仍可允许重新合并为单体，无法永久表达 XAge 源文件全集、职责、PBX 编译身份或跨文件总预算。
same_class_scan: 固定 canonical_branch=main、read_only_branches=[XAGE]、main lock=false、XAGE lock=true、两者 fork syncing=false，并对 schema、键序、角色互换、bool/int 替换及旧 protected_branches 第二真相源做对抗测试。
检查 CI、pre-push、release gate、部署入口与远端保护读取，确保新开发、PR、正式 CI、部署和 release candidate 都只能来自 main，直接更新或删除 main/XAGE 均被本地 hook 拒绝。
检查生产镜像 base digest、Python 与构建工具版本、89 个 hash-locked wheel、离线项目安装、pip check 和生产镜像内 backend 精确测试，拒绝可变依赖与网络取包。
检查部署 helper 的不可变源码/env/image、全 layer 秘密扫描、生命周期标签、pre-journal 回收、cutover journal、稳定窗口和 exact-ID 清理；事务安装器同时覆盖成功、自更新、第三文件崩溃、回滚、symlink/hardlink、approval 与 journal 类型攻击。
复核所有凭据/authority descriptor consumer，不再把 S_ISFIFO 当作匿名性证明；启动器同时绑定 /proc/self/fd 的 pipe:[inode] 内核身份并拒绝命名 FIFO，Linux runtime 自测覆盖 token 与 installer doctor 两个入口。
复核所有生命周期测试夹具的容器名来源；guard 暴露唯一 deployment_name(run_id, role)，生产标签与 Linux 真实 Docker parent-death 自测共享该函数，focused policy 同时锁定 wiring 和精确返回值。
在真实 PG16.14 中物化 reference 并双读一致，production 正向后分别注入默认值漂移、constraint-backed btree fillfactor 漂移和错误 Alembic head；三种负向均被目录比较和 CLI 拒绝，恢复后再次通过。
扫描 Home 下全部 XAge*.swift 与 PBX app Sources phase，证明旧单文件 architecture_limits 可被横向拆分绕过；新 manifest 固定七角色顺序、domains、per-file cap、物理文件全集和每项仅编译一次。
把当前七文件去重 import 后重新拼回单文件作为对抗变异；删除迁移期 monolith role/10305 cap，只允许完整有序七角色，证明重组单体、缺角色和乱序均被永久门禁拒绝。
把七文件按 manifest 顺序重新合并给既有聊天静态策略，保留原有 UI 自动化、键盘、滚动、进度、Markdown 与辅助功能结构摘要；只对必要的 private 到 internal 变化做规范化，不降低正文摘要。
确认 Android 仓库仍只有用户原有的 backend/analysis 与 backend/analysis_outputs 两个未跟踪目录，本任务未修改 Android。
test_evidence: 固定 linux/amd64 生产镜像完成真实构建；运行时验证 Python 3.11.15、pip 26.1.2、setuptools 83.0.0、wheel 0.47.0、项目 0.1.0 与 pip check，镜像内 backend exact 264 executed / 261 passed / 3 fixed skips。
production bundle installer 在断网 linux/amd64 容器中通过成功、失败、回滚、崩溃恢复、approval/type/hardlink/symlink 非 unittest 自测。
真实 PostgreSQL 门禁最终输出 PG16.14、21 migrations、53 tables、116 constraints、192 indexes、digest 59130e176694bbdd8806b2efb0ca93937b7bb58add6ae9bbdfe6ef806b61f392；正负路径与恢复正向全绿。
Swift source manifest 落地前单体形态通过，guard 文件 24/24；当时 tools 精确 74/74、0 skip，随后才进行七文件迁移。
七文件迁移后的 iPhone 17 Simulator Debug 全量 build 成功；PBX 编译列表包含 XAgeContracts、MainView、DataDashboard、Conversation、Healthspan、Settings、Components。
七文件后的 tools 保持 74/74、0 skip；首轮暴露同一 guard 测试仍把 sources[0] 假设为 10305 行 monolith，已改为读取当前完整 manifest 和动态 role cap，同一 test ID 与后续精确清单均通过。
最终架构复核后补上命名 FIFO 拒绝与单体回退变异，更新固定 registry 摘要后 tools 再次精确 74/74、0 skip，regression_guard validate/check 与 git diff --check 通过；Linux 命名 FIFO 真实运行路径仍由 hosted launcher self-test 负责最终证明。

首个完整 impacted 检查点已实际通过 tools 74/74、backend 261 passed + 3 固定 skip（264 exact IDs）、Health 25/25、iOS Unit 149/149、完整 UI 5/5、无签名 Release device archive/bundle、backend AI 213/213；最后小屏 UI 也执行为 2/2，但 `/tmp` 空间耗尽使 Xcode 无法写入结果摘要，所以门禁正确将该次 xcresult `unknown` 判红，没有将测试日志冒充最终绿灯。
只清理 16.8 GiB 可再生成的 `/private/tmp/xjie-*` 测试派生目录、结果包与归档后，使用门禁原样的 iPhone SE（第 3 代）命令复跑：2/2 通过、`xcresult` overall=Passed、精确计数和设备型号校验通过，Xcode 正常收尾。

冻结证据树的最终 `/usr/bin/python3 -I tools/run_regression_gate.py impacted` 从头通过 tools 74/74、backend exact 264、Health 25/25、Unit 149/149、full UI 5/5、AI 213/213、SE 3 2/2、Release archive/bundle、xcresult 和最终 diff；提交 c315b6e 后推送 PR #9。

PR #9 首个 hosted run 29345535226 的 production image 与 bundle installer 已通过；launcher Linux real-Docker self-test 因旧式自拼名称被新生命周期约束拒绝而失败，PG/backend exact 因 fail-fast 被跳过。失败日志被保留，修复改为共享 guard deployment_name；focused release policy 用例通过，完整本地与托管 exact-SHA 仍须重新执行。
changes: 把 main 与 XAGE 的 canonical/read-only 身份写入 schema 3 registry、CI、hook、release 和部署契约。
将 backend 生产依赖改为精确版本与 hash lock，构建固定 linux/amd64 digest 镜像并在镜像内执行 backend exact gate。
移除应用启动 create_all/手写 ALTER；新增真实 PostgreSQL reference/production physical catalog attestation。
新增 root-only production launcher、事务式 bundle installer、approval/journal、Linux 运行时自测和生产部署操作文档。
将 launcher 的 credential/doctor authority 从 FIFO 类型检查收紧为 Linux anonymous pipe 内核身份与 inode 双绑定，并给两个 consumer 增加命名 FIFO 负向运行测试。
将部署生命周期名称生成收敛为 guard 的 deployment_name(run_id, role)，Linux launcher 真实 Docker 自测不再维护第二套命名规则。
新增 quality/swift_source_manifest.json 与严格 guard，跨文件固定 9521 logical lines、类型/presentation/延时/静默失败预算和旧路由禁入。
移除拆分完成后的 monolith role 与 10305 行迁移兼容，增加七文件重新合并必须失败的永久变异测试，并把 AGENTS/contract 更新为最终态。
将 XAgeMainView 拆为七文件，加入 PBX app source phase，并把旧聊天策略输入规范化为 manifest 顺序的合并源码。

feature: feat(health-trust): establish report, profile and medication confirmation boundaries
scope: iOS / Android / Backend / Health Report / Health Profile / Trusted Medication / Apple Health / Expand Migration / Regression Gates
description: 本轮已建立报告提取候选→逐字段复核→报告级确认→可信 observation、画像候选→用户确认→可信 fact、用药预填→确认计划→版本化剂次/纠错/反应的共享信任边界，并让双端客户端消费服务端权威状态；同时收敛 iOS 首页入口、报告历史与解读、画像、用药提醒/统计、趋势、就医助手、支持合规页面及键盘/辅助功能行为。Apple 健康 observer 同批回调竞态经过两次保留的完整 Unit 红灯、聚焦绿灯不足以及第二轮静止窗口修复后，已通过 stress 10/10、相邻路径 6/6、AppleHealth 类 38/38 和最终完整 Unit 精确 163/163。当前仍只可视为大范围实现与自动化检查点，不是模块完成或发布候选：健康画像专项 HP-01 至 HP-05、报告专项 RP-01 至 RP-07、真实 PG16 迁移演练、完整 UI/小屏/Release 门禁与真机签核均未关闭。
minimum_reproduction: 旧报告 OCR/CSV 可在缺少逐字段和报告级确认的情况下被多个消费者读取；重复上传、失败恢复、来源撤回和评分生产没有同一工作流版本与幂等边界。
旧画像把长期标签、目标、安全信息、用药摘要和来源按局部字符串拼接；候选与事实、已确认与未确认、当前版本与修订历史没有统一服务端合同。
旧用药路径可让 OCR/legacy CRUD 直接成为启用药品；计划时间经过可能被解释为漏服，预计余量可能按计划而非 confirmed taken 扣减，不良反应也缺少仅时间关联和可纠错边界。
iOS 画像和用药页面把 accessibilityIdentifier 放在含交互后代的容器上，导致视觉可见按钮在 XCTest/VoiceOver 树中失去独立身份；只用 scrollDismissesKeyboard 还会留下 FocusState 和键盘附件。
Apple 健康 observer 在同一同步回调栈连续交付两个 completion 时，每个回调各自创建非结构化 MainActor Task，首个 drain 可能在第二个桥接 Task 到达前启动，造成同批事件被误判为新事件并执行两次 device-sync。
root_cause: 报告、画像、用药、AI、评分和客户端此前分别维护自己的局部状态，主体、显式确认、版本、稳定事件幂等、来源、纠错、撤回、失败恢复及 JSON 数值类型没有形成跨 schema、service、router、consumer 和双端 UI 的同一机器可读约束。首页入口也由分散布尔状态驱动，报告日期/上传日期、来源和评分展示各自拼接。辅助功能问题的直接根因是父容器标识覆盖交互后代；键盘问题的直接根因是只处理视觉滚动而未同步释放 FocusState/first responder。Apple 健康红灯的第一层根因是 observer completion 在 actor 跳转之前没有按注册隔离、线程安全的批次边界；第一版 lock-protected inbox 仍在首次 MainActor Task 到达后立即 take，无法覆盖同一系统唤醒但跨 executor turn 到达的其余 callback，因此聚焦运行可绿而完整 Unit 仍能拆成两次读取。第二轮永久约束改为锁内 revision 计数和有上限的静止窗口：只有 revision 在一个 quiet period 内不再变化，或达到最大等待，才在同一把锁内原子取走 batch。
permanent_invariants: 未确认报告候选不得进入 observation、趋势、画像来源、评分或 AI；报告确认必须绑定 subject、workflow_version 和稳定 client_event_id，并在重试时保持幂等。
画像候选永不直接成为 fact；普通健康候选可确认或暂不加入，目标只能由用户主动创建，安全候选必须进入编辑并再次确认；AI 只读取 active 且由用户、临床或已验证来源确认的事实。
可信用药只从显式确认计划产生；possibly_missed 永远不是服药事实，余量只使用每个剂次最新 confirmed taken，不良反应只表达 temporal_association_only 并可修正或撤回。
报告/画像/用药的所有查询和唯一键绑定 user_id 与 subject_user_id；来源按精确 source_type/source_ref 去重，重复请求不得增加事实、修订或来源数。
section 哨兵只能挂在静态标题或 Label；交互控件保留独立稳定 ID。所有用药文本编辑器使用共享方向门控下拉手势，并同时清理消费者 FocusState 与第一响应者。

同一 Apple 健康 observer 注册为每个注册建立独立 inbox；enqueue 在锁内递增 revision，交付前等待 10ms 静止期、revision 变化则重新等待、最长 50ms，并在同一把锁内完成静止判断和 batch 移除。同一系统唤醒 burst 只允许一次读取/上传并逐个 completion 完成一次；真正发生在活跃读取期间的新事件必须再执行一次 fresh read，停止、失效和账号切换必须隔离并冲刷旧注册。
0021→0022→0023 只能通过独立批准的 expand migration 项目执行，计划绑定有序 revision/down_revision 与逐文件 SHA，并在单一 PostgreSQL 事务成功后才 CAS head；普通部署仍禁止 DDL 和 alembic upgrade。
same_class_scan: 报告链覆盖上传、识别、逐字段决定、报告确认、手动恢复、重复指纹、撤回、摘要、趋势、病史关键指标、原件、评分与 AI 文本；未确认 observation 在所有消费者中保持不可见。
画像链覆盖默认本人/显式他人、response_state、资料完整度、普通/目标/安全候选、事实版本、来源、冲突、幂等、撤回、长期用药摘要和 AI consumer；安全事实不得自动生成。
用药链覆盖 OCR/prescription_import/legacy/manual 来源、确认计划、today 空态、taken/snooze/skip/correct、possibly_missed、预计剩余、不适反应、提醒权限/时区/账号/计划版本和画像/AI 边界。
客户端入口覆盖报告详情与重试、资料菜单、画像、问答附件、X 年龄、可信评分、首页八项快捷功能、Apple 健康首次成功前后状态、趋势和就医助手；本地占位值和研究算法不得成为生产事实或分数。
辅助功能与键盘覆盖画像 overview/candidate/missing/facts/BMI/用药跳转及用药计划头部、提醒、编辑、暂停/恢复、更多和全部文本编辑状态，拒绝父容器覆盖子 ID 或只视觉隐藏键盘。
Apple 健康 observer 覆盖同步回调 burst、活跃读取期间新事件、前台同步竞争、drain 完成窗口、停止/账号切换、后台 delivery 失败及迟到旧账号回调。
门禁同类扫描覆盖 iOS Unit/full UI/small UI/union、backend、tools 的版本控制清单、validator、CI、release fixture、production launcher 和 80 个静态对抗变异；运行结果必须与清单精确相等。

test_evidence: Backend full exact gate passed 290 executed = 287 passed + 3 pinned integration placeholders skipped; JUnit /tmp/xjie-final-backend-full-20260715.xml, SHA-256 b22b1942e1808c1a83ade87e610bcca7968467bf742313b14c39a035a23217da.
Tools exact gate passed 76/76 with no skips after the current inventory and 80 unique adversarial mutations were synchronized.

Report focused deterministic UI test passed exact 1/1 in /tmp/xjie-report-interpretation-ui-final3.xcresult on iPhone 17 Pro; fail-closed transport audit passed. Four current-run screenshots were exported, but the original-report preview is a solid black test fixture and therefore is not proof of real PDF/image rendering.

Android current checkpoint passed exact JVM 80/80, static tools 11/11, assembleDebug and lintDebug. No connected Android device was available, so notification delivery, OEM keyboard, TalkBack, large text and Health Connect runtime behavior remain manual blockers.

The preserved iOS full Unit attempt /tmp/xjie-final-unit-20260715.xcresult was red at 162 passed / 163 expected: AppleHealthSyncViewModelTests/testConcurrentObserverCallbacksCoalesceToOneDeviceSync failed and the exact xcresult validator correctly refused a green result.

The strengthened burst regression delivers 5 synchronous callbacks while asserting exactly 1 HealthKit read, 1 device-sync POST and exactly 5 completion invocations. The production attempt stages callbacks in a lock-protected inbox owned by one observer registration before crossing to MainActor, and flushes the old inbox on stop/account invalidation.

A later full exact rerun in /tmp/xjie-final-unit-rerun-20260715.xcresult invalidated the first focused green as completion evidence: 163 executed, 162 passed, 1 failed, 0 skipped and 0 expected failures on iPhone 17 Pro; xcodebuild exited 65 and the exact validator exited 1. The current tree has not yet passed full UI 6/6, iPhone SE small-screen 2/2, Unit/full-UI union 169/169, unsigned generic-device Release archive/bundle verification, final impacted gate, exact-SHA PR CI or post-merge main push CI.
specialized_document_blockers: HP-01: profile APIs expose current fact/version but not an append-only, subject-isolated ordered revision list or complete dual-client history entry.
HP-02: device health values are constructible in tests, but the production Apple Health/Health Connect observation→candidate/fact chain with manual-value conflict handling is not proven.
HP-03: the current single goal.primary does not support multi-goal create/update/delete with status, start time and linked metric, and AI must remain unable to create goals.

HP-04: the long-term medication summary has not proven the six required fields—name, purpose, start time, still taking, source and latest confirmation—while continuing to exclude dose/reminder details.
HP-05: primary_action and independent source count can still be client-derived, and the complete whitelist of profile consumers has not been enforced by server contract tests.
RP-01: report confirmation does not yet enqueue a real idempotent HealthScoreSnapshot producer with versioned input policies and complete/partial/failed states.
RP-02: blur and missing-page recovery mappings exist, but no real image/PDF detector, page/region locator or recapture path has runtime evidence.
RP-03: duplicate handling currently proves byte SHA reuse, not semantic same-report recognition across rescan/rephoto variants.
RP-04: the full report state matrix and unique primary action lack complete iOS and Android runtime UI automation.

RP-05: history row metadata is covered, but filters, original-file opening and the full original→candidate→correction→confirmation→observation→interpretation→score provenance chain are not accepted; the current black preview blocks original rendering sign-off.
RP-06: follow-up rules and calculation method_summary still lack authoritative, localizable sources and an evidence-gated unavailable state.
RP-07: ordered multi-image assets for one report, page count/order and per-field page/region provenance are not implemented.
unresolved_risks: The Apple Health observer automated Unit boundary is now green through stress, adjacent, class and full exact tests, but Simulator scheduling cannot replace real iPhone/Apple Watch HealthKit background-delivery and account-switch verification; all remaining exact gates must still pass on one stable candidate tree before completion or release.
0021→0022→0023 has not completed a trusted real PG16 backup/restore, mid-chain rollback, final catalog and old/new CRUD rehearsal; production migration and deployment remain blocked.
HP-01 through HP-05 and RP-01 through RP-07 are explicit module and TestFlight release blockers, not deferred polish.

Existing verified legacy profile data is not automatically mirrored to the new fact store unless explicitly migrated or resaved; report withdrawal behavior for previously user-accepted facts still requires a product decision and must not silently delete them.

The backend does not yet provide prescription browsing, original medication-image upload, independent dose-history aggregation or refill eligibility; clients must continue to mark these capabilities unavailable rather than infer them.

Simulator and deterministic transport do not prove real iPhone HealthKit authorization/background observer, Apple Watch, real notification delivery, third-party Chinese keyboard, Dynamic Type, VoiceOver, real report image/PDF rendering, Health Connect/TalkBack or controlled real AI answer quality.
release_status: TestFlight upload is forbidden. Latest uploaded build remains 1.0(17), so any future candidate must be build 18 or greater.

Before release, the stable tree still needs full UI 6, small-screen UI 2, Unit/full-UI union 169, unsigned device archive/bundle verification, all five new-candidate-bound sign-offs, main-based PR, exact-SHA CI, merge and post-merge main push CI. Current checkpoints already include Unit 163/163, backend 290 = 287+3 and tools 76/76, but any subsequent behavior change invalidates affected evidence.
No production deployment, database mutation, signed archive, export or upload was performed by this checkpoint.
notes: This record intentionally preserves /tmp/xjie-final-unit-20260715.xcresult and /tmp/xjie-final-unit-rerun-20260715.xcresult as the two 162/163 failures, plus the intervening focused pass; the later /tmp/xjie-final-unit-quiescence-20260715.xcresult 163/163 is the current authoritative Unit checkpoint and does not erase the root-cause evidence.
No credential, token, signing material, production health data or secret value is included.

author: Codex
subject: perf(health-trust): speed the iOS delivery gate without weakening release proof
feature: perf(health-trust): speed the iOS delivery gate without weakening release proof
scope: iOS Repository / Regression Gates / Developer Experience
description: 将防回归执行拆成 fast、impacted、release/assert-release 三层。日常 fast 只运行静态契约、空白检查和真实 change impact 选出的 Unit/backend，排除完整 UI、小屏和设备 Archive；稳定实现才运行一次 impacted；冻结后的 main exact-SHA 候选继续执行完整发布门禁。
root_cause: 此前日常反馈与候选/发布证明共享同一重量级执行面，impacted 无条件运行 tools full，backend full 与 AI/Health focused 重复，hooks 又在 check 内部验证 registry 前显式重复 validate，导致普通编辑反馈被放大到十几分钟。
same_class_scan: 审查 pre-commit、pre-push、CI policy/backend/iOS/aggregator、run gate planner/lock/evidence、registry commands、PG16 与 release script 三次 assert-release。
确认 release required commands、build 单调性、main/PR/远端身份、五项真实签核和同一 IPA 校验均未从发布边界删除。
确认 Android 仓库和 Android 源码未修改。
test_evidence: run-gate 定向 2/2、release-policy 定向 4/4、真实 hook immutable snapshot 1/1、xcresult validator 8/8 通过。
UI fail-closed 静态审计命名回归 1/1 通过，耗时 152.712 秒；基线零违规，80 个对抗变异全部仍被拒绝。
最终实际 fast 通过：backend exact 324 = 321 passed + 3 fixed skips、tools exact 77/77、iOS Unit exact 174/174；静态 guard、tracked/untracked diff 与 working-tree 稳定性检查通过，输出固定为 NOT RELEASE EVIDENCE。
首次实际 fast 已让三套测试全部通过，并在最终 diff 阶段抓到一个新增测试文件末尾空行；删除纯空白后再跑最终 fast 全绿，证明格式失败没有被吞掉。完整 UI、小屏和 Archive 均未进入 fast。
精确 XCTest inventory 已同步为 Unit 174、full UI 6、small 2、union 180。
changes: run_regression_gate.py 新增 fast 模式并明确排除 full UI、small UI 和 device Archive。
tracked/untracked 空白检查调整为昂贵测试前 fail-fast，并在测试后保留第二次漂移复核，避免格式问题浪费整轮 backend/Xcode 时间。
impacted planner 不再无条件加入 tools full；backend full 存在时删除重复 backend_ai/backend_health focused。
pre-commit、pre-push 和 CI policy 删除 check 已覆盖的重复 standalone validate。
更新 iOS/根 AGENTS、回归制度、memory/runbook 与精确 XCTest 清单。
remaining_risks: fast 仅是日常反馈，不能证明完整 UI、小屏、PG16、设备包、真机或 TestFlight 候选。
当前健康信任工作树跨 iOS、backend、migration 和 gate，稳定候选仍须执行完整 impacted、main exact-SHA CI 和 release 边界。
release_status: 没有递增 build、签名、导出、上传或部署；TestFlight 最新仍为 1.0(17)。
下一候选仍须 build 18 或更高，并完成五项候选绑定真实签核。
notes: This change deliberately speeds the edit loop without treating fast or impacted output as release evidence.
No Android file, credential, token, signing material, production health data or secret value is included.

description: 收口旧表未完成的健康画像、报告、用药、Apple 健康与交互合同，并实现 715b 的膳食可信纵切、设备管理诚实能力门控和对话功能气泡。膳食五类入口统一先生成待确认草稿，只有显式确认可形成正式记录；设备缺少厂商协议时明确不可用；功能气泡通过类型化注册表导航或预填，不能绕过目标模块的权限和确认门。
minimum_reproduction: 旧照片识别可直接写正式 Meal，文字整段可能成为食物名；跨 04:00、跨时区或响应丢失后重试时，日期、payload 和总结可能漂移。
client_event_id 在不同业务动作复用时会被旧全局唯一键误判冲突；同一动作并发重试又必须保证 provider 与写入恰好一次。
设备只有旧 CGM 后端原语而没有 BLE/NFC 厂商协议、电量或保修权威源；展示扫描成功会伪造能力。
对话 starter 与附件菜单只拼字符串，没有类型动作、可用性检查、草稿保留和目标模块确认边界。
在注销确认 sheet 输入“注销”后，键盘仍存在但 App 自有“完成”按钮不存在；旧 UI helper 因接受系统键盘本地化的“完成”文案，在部分语言环境下会假绿。
首次把共享键盘代码整体移出 XAGE manifest 后，tools 精确门禁在 test_required_ui_tests_use_single_deterministic_app_factory_and_audit 报告 dismissal owner inventory 漂移，证明底层 resignFirstResponder 所有权不能随视图组件一起迁移。
root_cause: 健康、报告、用药、膳食、设备与对话入口此前各自维护局部字符串和页面状态，没有把主体、来源、显式确认、操作类型、稳定事件、完整请求快照、版本、权威回读和失败关闭做成共享机器合同。膳食把识别结果等同于事实，服务端幂等收据又缺少 operation scope；客户端在 suspension 后还能用同一事件重组不同 payload，日期和时区改变时也没有原子失效全部派生状态。注销、反馈、报告筛选和新用药编辑器中的无 NavigationStack modal 仍依赖 SwiftUI keyboard toolbar，工具栏在该呈现层级不挂载；测试又用系统键盘的本地化标签代替 App-owned 证据，因而没有尽早阻断。
permanent_invariants: 所有膳食来源只产生 pending draft；只有本人主体显式确认可创建正式记录，旧 /api/meals 与未确认草稿不得进入新历史、总结、周回顾或 AI。
饮食日按请求时区本地 04:00 计算；客户端在首次 suspension 前冻结 account、operation、event ID、typed payload、编码字节、日期、时区和 reconciliation，不确定结果只重放原快照。
幂等唯一性绑定 tenant + subject + operation scope + client_event_id；同动作同 payload 重放、不同 payload 返回 409，不同动作可复用事件 ID。
生产照片重试只读取租户绑定共享 S3 对象并复验 digest/size/MIME；数据库不得保存原图、凭据或本地路径，缺配置必须失败关闭。
删除先清旧结论并标 stale，再读取权威 dashboard；回读失败不得恢复旧总结。逻辑日、时区或账号变化立即清空所有旧日派生状态。
报告、画像、用药和 AI 只消费当前主体已确认可信投影；候选、冲突、撤回、possibly_missed、原始 OCR 和占位值不是事实。
缺少厂商协议或权威状态源时，设备页只展示可解释的不支持状态；禁止伪扫描、伪序列号、伪电量、伪保修和本地假成功。
对话气泡只调用类型化注册动作并复用目标模块权限与确认门；预填不等于发送，往返导航必须保留未发送草稿。
无 NavigationStack 的 modal form 不得依赖 .toolbar(.keyboard)；必须使用共享安全区完成栏，拥有唯一 App-owned accessibility ID 和至少 44pt 命中区，点击同时清除 FocusState 与 UIKit first responder。UI 证据不得用系统键盘的本地化 return 标签替代 App 控件。
跨模块安全区完成栏可以位于 Views/Shared，但唯一 UIKit resignFirstResponder owner 必须留在受静态策略审计的 XAGE 合同中；重构不得修改所有者清单或提高架构预算来消除红灯。
same_class_scan: 扫描 iOS 首页、更多、报告、画像、用药、Apple 健康、膳食、问答各入口，以及键盘、返回、空/加载/错误/长内容/小屏/大字/辅助功能状态。
扫描 backend dietary draft/record/summary/cache/object storage/text extraction/router/service/worker、旧 meals 隔离、可信健康投影、AI consumer、tenant/subject/来源/幂等和 0021→0025 migration。
扫描 text、voice、chat、camera、library、recent、confirm、update、delete、complete 的同类事件冲突和模糊交付，统一 operation-scoped 收据与 wire snapshot。
扫描设备管理现有 CGM binding、CoreBluetooth/CoreNFC 配置和厂商资料，确认只能交付独立诚实状态页。
确认 Android 仓库保持本轮开始前的既有工作树状态，本轮未编辑、构建、验证或发布 Android。
扫描无 NavigationStack 的 modal form：注销、意见反馈、报告筛选、提醒设置以及用药计划/OCR/跳过/纠正/不适编辑全部改用共享 xAgeKeyboardDoneAccessory；已有 NavigationStack 的 Login、Family、Meals、Elderly、HealthReportReview 和 PatientHistory 不属于该失效机制。
扫描 ChatView、Elderly、XAGE、Login 与 Medication 的键盘 dismissal owner inventory；只拆出纯 SwiftUI accessory，XAgeKeyboard 继续由 manifest 内合同唯一持有。
